ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion factor */,
  "from_size_standard" TEXT /* The size standard to convert from */,
  "to_size_standard" TEXT /* The size standard to convert to */,
  "conversion_factor" TEXT /* The conversion factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion applicable to this product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_standard" TEXT /* The customer's preferred size standard */,
  "measurement_details" TEXT /* The customer's body measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* The feedback provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the product */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* The size standard for this inventory item */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* The size value for this inventory item */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* The current status of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who performed the conversion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product for which the conversion was performed */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was performed */,
  "initial_size_standard" TEXT /* The size standard the customer started with */,
  "converted_size_standard" TEXT /* The size standard the customer converted to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion record */,
  "australian_size" INTEGER /* Australian size equivalent */,
  "american_size" INTEGER /* American size equivalent */,
  "european_size" INTEGER /* European size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* United Kingdom size equivalent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_european_size FOREIGN KEY ("european_size") REFERENCES sizes_european ("european_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_australian_size FOREIGN KEY ("australian_size") REFERENCES sizes_australian ("australian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_uk_size FOREIGN KEY ("uk_size") REFERENCES sizes_uk ("uk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_american_size FOREIGN KEY ("american_size") REFERENCES sizes_american ("american_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_australian" (
  "australian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Australian size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* The actual size value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("australian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_american" (
  "american_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each American size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* The actual size value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("american_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_european" (
  "european_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each European size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* The actual size value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("european_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_uk" (
  "uk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UK size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* The actual size value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uk_id")
)
